feature-two-column-scene.props: {"headline":"VS Code Plugin","subhead":"Kanbus control inside the editor","bodyPrimary":"Manage board state without leaving your coding environment.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"pictogram","pictogramType":"vscode","pictogramScale":1.22}

{"headline":"VS Code Plugin","subhead":"Kanbus control inside the editor","bodyPrimary":"Open the Kanban board in a VS Code tab, drag issues, edit details, and keep code visible in adjacent panes.","bodySecondary":"Jump from issue references to details instantly via Activity Bar and Command Palette integration.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"vscode-demo"}

cue.label: Introduction
cue.voice: Manage your project board directly inside VS Code. No context switching between browser and editor.

cue.label: Integrated Board
cue.voice: Open the Kanban board in a dedicated tab, drag issues across columns, and edit details while code stays visible in split view.

cue.label: Quick Access
cue.voice: Access Kanbus via Activity Bar or Command Palette, and jump from issue IDs in comments straight to their details.
